title: Thoth's Encyclopedia
body: # **[WORK IN PROGRESS]** Adding various vanilla adjacent features and tweaks to enhance gameplay. ## New Functional Blocks ![The pyrotechnics table and the kiln](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02ee409533f4a966cc01b696343361e2854b9713.png) ## Unique Weapons ![A rapier and a halberd in Arsenal's weaponracks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad71ec155a27e6f146bee4a5a2f962593916d153.png) ## Functional Accessories ![Inventory after equipping both accessories](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/246549a7bc00f043e493b115586cc1afb8ea0396.png) ## Maybe a couple of secrets ## More to come in the future! All features: [Thoth's Encyclopedia](https://destined-to-wander.notion.site/Thoth-s-Encyclopedia-2e132ae029e78019accbd71c352d6595?pvs=143)
